snippet.title: DOBRO JUTRO KOMŠIJA (SEZONA 3) - EPIZODA 3
snippet.description:
"Dobro Jutro, Komšija" vam predstavlja novu sezonu najgledanije serije. Nakon sedam dijelova filma i dvije sezone serije tu je nova sezona serije koji će vas nasmijati do suza, kao i svi prethodni dijelovi do sad.

Pretplatite/subscribe se na naš YouTube kanal: https://bit.ly/2MWNu3v​
Sve epizode prve sezone serije: https://bit.ly/35sbBNW​
Sve epizode druge sezone serije: https://bit.ly/35OCz2y​
Sve epizode treće sezone serije: https://bit.ly/3t1AKv1​
Pogledajte sve dijelove naših filmova: https://bit.ly/36suGkm​
Najbolje scene iz serije (prva sezona): https://bit.ly/35sbJNq​
Najbolje scene iz serije (druga sezona): https://bit.ly/3qwLrp0​

Zapratite nas i na zvaničnim profilima serijala "Dobro jutro komšija".
Pratite najave i atmosferu sa snimanja najgledanijeg TV serijala.

Instagram: https://bit.ly/2CiuPt3​
Facebook: https://bit.ly/2ASOHDh​

snippet.title: Danijela Štajnfeld za Insajder: Htela sam da izbegnem da otkrijem ime, ali je jedna kap prelila čašu
snippet.description:
“Mene je silovao moj kolega i dragi prijatelj Branislav Lečić, u maju 2012. godine. Posle četiri dana igrali smo predstavu. Bila sam u šoku. Htela sam odmah da zovem policiju, ali sam razmišljala šta će se desiti. Morate da razumete to stanje“, kaže u ekskluzivnom intervjuu za Insajder glumica Danijela Štajnfeld.
Danijela Štajnfeld je iz Njujorka gde živi već godinama, doputovala u Beograd kako bi dala izjavu tužilaštvu, a u opširnoj ispovesti za Insajder glumica prvi put pred kamerama opisuje sam događaj koji se odigrao u maju 2012. 
https://bit.ly/3lJnwRh

Pratite nas na https://insajder.net i na društvenim mrežama

Fejsbuk  https://www.facebook.com/insajder.net/
Twitter https://twitter.com/Insajder_net
Instagram  https://www.instagram.com/insajder_net/

snippet.title: Hurricane - LOCO LOCO - Serbia 🇷🇸  - Official Music Video - Eurovision 2021
snippet.description:
Hurricane will represent Serbia at the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 with the song LOCO LOCO.
-
Composer: Nemanja Antonić
Lyrics: Sanja Vučić
Arrangement: Nemanja Antonić, Darko Dimitrov
-
Lyrics:
Nemoj da se ljutiš, hrabrost skupi
Jedna cura kao ja ne traži obećanja
Ne skidaš taj pogled ti sa mene
Lako ušla sam ja u tvoje vene

Osmeh tvoj mi kaže
Da me želiš koga lažeš
Slatka kao ćoko moko
Hajde budi loco

Ram ba-ba-bam
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biže lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

Baby, baby, baby, čemu drama
Jedna cura kao ja ne traži obećanja
Baby, baby, baby, igram sama
To što nisi sa mnom to je tvoja mana

Osmeh tvoj mi kaže
Da me želiš koga lažeš
Slatka kao čoko moko
Hajde budi loco

1, 2... Girls, Come on!
Loco loco
Loco loco
Loco loco

Ne skidaš pogled sa mene
Lako sam ti ušla u vene
Hajde budi loco loco

A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biće lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco
A ja slatka sam i fina
A ti si sam sam sam
I ja znam znam znam
Da biće lom lom lom
Zato hajde budi loco loco

-

snippet.title: Cenić: Baja ostavio ženu i dijete gladne, a on kiti muziku
snippet.description:
Bile su izjave kako se neće potpisati nabavka vakcina bez izmjene Izbornog zakona. Kakve veze ima zakon sa nabavkom. Oni su se vakcinisali, šta ih briga za ostali narod. Dodik je nabavkom vakcina gurnuo ikonu postrani, izgleda da u FBiH nisu imali šta gurnuti postrani, kazala je u Pressingu ekspertica za ekonomiju i građanska aktivistica Svetlana Cenić.

Follow us:

snippet.title: Диана је капитен навијачица! | Кога ће Диана преузети у тиму?
snippet.description:

           kontakt: 063612100 - Jelena

Text pesme:

S' jabukama vruća pita 
Na tvom stolu 
A ja oko bacio na 
Polugolu 

Dodaću joj nešto ljuto 
I cigaru 
Zar postoji vjeran muž 
U noćnom baru 

Koji svirač želi polovnu gitaru 

Ref: 

Šta će s' princezom roker u duši 
Prebrzo živi pije i puši 
Tu niz brdo 
Tu niz brdo sve krene 

Šta će s' princezom roker u duši 
Kad ne bi zbog nje rezao vene 
Šta radiš ti 
Šta radiš ti kraj mene 

Od sramote nek' se ćuti 
Priča naša 
Ja sam samo falš na ruci 
Bogataša 

Dodaću joj nešto ljuto 
I cigaru 
Zar postoji vjeran muž 
U noćnom baru 

Koji svirač želi polovnu gitaru 

Ref: 

Šta će s' princezom roker u duši 
Prebrzo živi pije i puši 
Tu niz brdo 
Tu niz brdo sve krene 

Šta će s' princezom roker u duši 
Kad ne bi zbog nje rezao vene 
Šta radiš ti 
Šta radiš ti kraj mene

✔ Social Media: https://emdc.yt/emirdjulovic

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz, Arpino Sachi
Back vocal: Maša Sitarica
Mix & Master: Arpino Sachi


Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrati se sve dharma 
mama mia

 ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x3


vers 2.
da li mislis na mene ko prije
prisjetis se probije ko noz
navijas ti za mene i lijek
tvoj sam jedini ja antidot

znas ti moje namjere ne nisu namjerne
ali vuce me na zlo
velike su razmjere izmedju zavjere
razlika je nebo tlo

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugil treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

snippet.title: Od naknade s biroa kupili ovce
snippet.description:
Nermin i Amina Šemić iz Kaknja uspjeli su od naknade za nezaposlene koje su dobili s biroa zapošljavanja uštedjeti novac i kupiti ovce. Danas imaju mini farmu romanovskih ovaca i žive na selu. Kaže ovaj bračni par da je puno lakše i ljepše živjeti na selu nego u gradu. Svoju budućnost vide u ovčarstvu jer u selu Zlokuće ima samo šest kuća iz kojih se dimi. Priroda je besprijekorno čista a trave ima u izobilju. Nermin se odlično snalazi s ovcama i ove godine udvostručit će svoje stado. Inače sve više se ljudi vraća u Zlokuće  gdje grade vikendice i drže stoku. Ovo selo je 2000 godine potpuno uništilo klizište. Vlast je ljude naselila u blizini Kaknja gdje im je pomogla izgraditi nove kuće. Primjer mladih stočara je vrijedan pažnje.
Pridružite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: Putin odgovorio Bajdenu: Amerika će morati na ovo da računa
snippet.description:
Predsednik Rusije Vladimir Putin je, reagujući na izjavu američkog predsednika Džoa Bajdena, američkom lideru poželeo zdravlje. „Što se tiče izjave mog američkog kolege, mi se zaista, kako je rekao, znamo lično. Šta bih mu odgovorio? Rekao bih mu: Neka ste živi i zdravi! Želim mu dobro zdravlje“, rekao je Putin.

Prethodno je Bajden u intervjuu za „Ej-Bi-Si njuz“ rekao da svog ruskog kolegu smatra „ubicom“. Bajden je tokom intervjua istakao da „poznaje“ Vladimira Putina i da ruski predsednik „poznaje“ njega. Na pitanje novinara da razjasni da li Bajden smatra Putina ubicom, američki predsednik je odgovorio: „Mhm, smatram“.

Za sve najvažnije vesti, komentare i analize posetite naš sajt ► https://rs.sputniknews.com/

U moru informacija treba izabrati pravu.

Želite prvi da saznate vest, ne sumnjate u njenu tačnost i ispratite najbitnije događaje u svetu koji utiču i na naše živote? Interesuju vas mišljenja najeminentnijih stručnjaka iz širokog spektra oblasti i komentari na sve goruće teme? Pronađite to na Sputnjiku.

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

WIIP: https://wiip.rs

Pavlezi: https://www.instagram.com/pavlezi.mp3/

GLE.TV Production
GLE Instagram https://www.instagram.com/gle.tv/​
GLE Youtube https://www.youtube.com/results?searc...​
http://gledaj.rs​

Instagram- https://www.instagram.com/ruza_rupic/
Mail-ruzicarupic1@gmail.com
Snap-ruzarofficial
fb stranica-https://www.facebook.com/Ruza-Rupic-389656007896432/
#IMPRESIVNO #IMPRESIVNOsaRuzomRupic #BakaPrase

snippet.title: Дима има нову девојку! | Диана је љубоморна на Диму због његове нове девојке!
snippet.description:
Диана је дошла у школу и видела како Дима љуби своју нову девојку! Диана се правила да јој није стало, али су њени пријатељи приметили да нешто није у реду. Дајана је љубоморна на Диму, шта ће кошаркаш кад сазна? Да ли ће Диана и Дима поново бити заједно? А зашто је Дајана љубоморна, јер има кошаркаш?! Погледајте у овој серији!
Још један видео: https://youtu.be/vGeD4-z8hj4
Претплатите се на канал!👩‍👩‍👦‍👦 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJuIFPGd2r5UM2rD2LGgvFg?sub_confirmation=1
Не заборавите на звоно!🔔🔔🔔
Хвала на вашим свиђањима!❤️❤️❤️

hr.title: Dima ima novu djevojku! | Diana je ljubomorna na Dimu zbog njegove nove djevojke!
hr.description:
Diana je došla u školu i vidjela kako Dima ljubi svoju novu djevojku! Diana se pravila da je nije briga, ali njezini su prijatelji primijetili da nešto nije u redu. Diana je ljubomorna na Dima, što će učiniti košarkaš kad sazna? Hoće li Diana i Dima opet biti zajedno? A zašto je Diana ljubomorna, jer ima košarkaša?! Pogledajte ovu seriju!
Pretplatite se na kanal! 👩‍👩‍👦‍👦

snippet.title: Ofarbajte jaja bez hemije na originalan način - sasvim prirodno/ Farbanje uskršnjih jaja
snippet.description:
Bliži nam se vaskrs pa evo i prvog videa za ovu godinu za farbanje jaja. Ofarbajte jaja na originalan način bez upotrebe hemije, sasvim prirodno. Kako bi jaja dobila ovaj efekat najbolje je koristiti bela , pa na početku videa možete videti kako da izbelite obična žuta jaja. 

● SASTOJCI ZA IZBELJIVANJE JAJA●
500 ml vode
400 ml alkohlnog sirćeta

●SASTOJCI ZA FARBANJE JAJA●
80 gr čaja od hibiskusa
1 kašičica sirćeta (alkoholnog ili vinskog)
proključala voda
+ malo ulja za premazivanje
#farbanjejaja #uskrs #vasrs #uskršnjajaja #easter #eastereggs

fr.title: Peindre les œufs sans produits chimiques de la manière originale - tout à fait naturel
fr.description:
Pâques approche, voici donc la première vidéo de cette année pour peindre des œufs. Peignez les œufs de la manière originale sans utiliser de produits chimiques, tout naturellement. Pour que l'œuf obtienne cet effet, il est préférable d'utiliser du blanc.Ainsi, au début de la vidéo, vous pouvez voir comment blanchir un œuf jaune ordinaire.

INGRÉDIENTS DE BLANCHIMENT DES OEUFS
500 ml d'eau
400 ml de vinaigre alcoolisé

INGRÉDIENTS POUR PEINDRE LES OEUFS
80 g de thé d'hibiscus
1 cuillère à café de vinaigre (alcoolisé ou vin)
eau bouillante
+ un peu d'huile pour le revêtement

de.title: Malen Sie Eier ohne Chemikalien auf die ursprüngliche Art und Weise - ganz natürlich
de.description:
Ostern steht vor der Tür, daher hier das erste Video für dieses Jahr zum Malen von Eiern. Malen Sie die Eier auf natürliche Weise ohne Verwendung von Chemikalien, ganz natürlich. Damit das Ei diesen Effekt erzielt, ist es am besten, Weiß zu verwenden. Am Anfang des Videos können Sie sehen, wie ein gewöhnliches gelbes Ei weiß wird.

EI WHITENING ZUTATEN
500 ml Wasser
400 ml alkoholischer Essig

ZUTATEN ZUM MALEN VON EIEREN
80 g Hibiskus-Tee
1 Teelöffel Essig (Alkoholiker oder Wein)
Gekochtes Wasser
+ etwas Öl zum Beschichten

el.title: Βάψτε αυγά χωρίς χημικά με τον αρχικό τρόπο - αρκετά φυσικά / Ζωγραφική Πασχαλινά αυγά
el.description:
Το Πάσχα πλησιάζει, οπότε εδώ είναι το πρώτο βίντεο για φέτος για τη ζωγραφική αυγών. Χρωματίστε τα αυγά με τον αρχικό τρόπο χωρίς τη χρήση χημικών, φυσικά. Προκειμένου το αυγό να έχει αυτό το αποτέλεσμα, είναι καλύτερο να χρησιμοποιήσετε λευκό, οπότε στην αρχή του βίντεο μπορείτε να δείτε πώς να λευκάσετε ένα συνηθισμένο κίτρινο αυγό.

ΠΕΡΙΣΣΟΤΕΡΑ ΣΥΣΤΑΤΙΚΑ ΛΕΥΚΕΤΙΣΜΟΥ
500 ml νερού
400 ml αλκοολικού ξιδιού

ΣΥΣΤΑΤΙΚΑ ΓΙΑ ΖΩΓΡΑΦΙΚΗ ΑΥΓΑ
80 γραμμάρια τσαγιού ιβίσκου
1 κουταλάκι του γλυκού ξύδι (αλκοολικό ή κρασί)
βρασμένο νερό
+ λίγο λάδι για επικάλυψη
#farbanjejaja #uskrs #vasrs # uskršnjajaja #easter #eastereggs

it.title: Dipingi le uova senza sostanze chimiche nel modo originale - abbastanza naturale
it.description:
La Pasqua si avvicina, quindi ecco il primo video di quest'anno per dipingere le uova. Dipingi le uova nel modo originale senza l'uso di prodotti chimici, abbastanza naturalmente. Affinché l'uovo abbia questo effetto, è meglio usare il bianco, quindi all'inizio del video puoi vedere come sbiancare un normale uovo giallo.

INGREDIENTI PER SBIANCARE L'UOVO
500 ml di acqua
400 ml di aceto alcolico

INGREDIENTI PER VERNICIARE LE UOVA
80 g di tè all'ibisco
1 cucchiaino di aceto (alcolico o vino)
acqua bollita
+ un filo d'olio per ricoprire

pl.title: Maluj jajka bez chemii w oryginalny sposób - całkiem naturalne / Malowanie pisanek
pl.description:
Zbliża się Wielkanoc, więc oto pierwszy w tym roku film przedstawiający malowanie jajek. Maluj jajka w oryginalny sposób, bez użycia chemikaliów, całkiem naturalnie. Aby jajko uzyskało ten efekt, najlepiej użyć białego, więc na początku filmu można zobaczyć, jak wybielić zwykłe żółte jajko.

SKŁADNIKI WYBIELAJĄCE JAJKA
500 ml wody
400 ml octu alkoholowego

SKŁADNIKI DO MALOWANIA JAJ
80 g herbaty z hibiskusa
1 łyżeczka octu (alkohol lub wino)
gotowana woda
+ trochę oleju do powlekania
#farbanjejaja #uskrs #vasrs # uskršnjajaja #easter #eastereggs

ro.title: Vopsiți ouă fără substanțe chimice în mod original - destul de natural / Vopsiți ouă de Paște
ro.description:
Paștele se apropie, așa că iată primul videoclip pentru acest an pentru vopsirea ouălor. Vopsiți ouăle în modul original, fără a folosi substanțe chimice, destul de natural. Pentru ca oul să obțină acest efect, cel mai bine este să folosiți albul, așa că la începutul videoclipului puteți vedea cum să albiți un ou galben obișnuit.

INGREDIENTE DE ALBITURARE A OUAUELOR
500 ml de apă
400 ml oțet alcoolic

INGREDIENTE PENTRU VOPSEA DE OUĂ
80 g ceai de hibiscus
1 linguriță de oțet (alcoolic sau vin)
apa fiarta
+ puțin ulei pentru acoperire

hr.title: Diana otvara svoju plesnu školu! | Školski karanten!
hr.description:
Škola je u karanteni, a učenici se pomno prate kako bi se pridržavali karantinskih propisa. Diana, kako ne bi svima bilo toliko dosadno, otvara vlastitu plesnu školu, u kojoj ćete trenirati sve koji to žele. Tko će ići u plesnu školu? Pogledajte ovo izdanje! snippet.title: POZNATI ZADRUGAR IMAO NAPAD PANIKE ISPRED BOLNICE! VUK MOB:  Nisam video Olju i bebu, lupa mi srce!
snippet.description:
Najbrže rastući portal u Srbiji https://www.alo.rs/

Vuk je došao svojim automobilom i poneo korpu za bebu, dok je njegova majka Nena Gojković došla u pratnji sina Tadije i druge snaje Kristine.

Kako je "Alo!" prvi ekskluzivno saznao, verenica Vuka Moba, Olivera Konatar, porodila se pre tri dana u Narodnom frontu prirodnim putem i na svet donela zdravu devojčicu kojoj su dali ime Teona.

Novinarka: Martina Mitrović

snippet.title: URANAK Šta čeka Lečića ako se dokaže da je kriv? Ivana Josifović, Stanko Crnobrnja, Ivana Stevanović
snippet.description:
Dobrodošli na zvanični YouTube kanal K1 TV-a!
↓ ↓ ↓ Posetite naš sajt i naloge na društvenim mrežama:
K1TV WEB: https://bit.ly/K1TVsajt
K1TV Program: https://bit.ly/K1TVprogram
✔ FACEBOOK: https://bit.ly/K1TVFacebook 
📷 INSTAGRAM: https://bit.ly/K1TVInstagram
❥ YOUTUBE: https://bit.ly/K1TVYouTube

Razonodite se uz muzičko-zabavni sadržaj domaće produkcije najvišeg standarda, kao i premijerno prikazivanje najpopularnijih stranih TV formata.
Iz naše produkcije izdvajamo sledeće emisije:

"JOJO"
Dve devojke iz grada koje su navikle na modu, izlaske, moderne tehnologije i glamur pokušavaju da upoznaju manje urbane delove Srbije i da ih zavole.
Uskoro:

"Šta sam sebi, ko sam tebi"
Voditelj, Ivan Stanković, marketing guru, vodi intervju sa popularnim autorima u studiju, pred publikom. Gost “jedan na jedan” razgovara sa voditeljem o svemu, “na iglama” zbog voditelja i prisutne publike.
LINK: https://bit.ly/StaSamSebiIkoSamSebi

"Top Lista"
Drugačija od drugih, Iva, vodi vas u svet aktuelne svetske i domaće muzičke scene. Saznaćete šta drugi slušaju, ko je i zbog čega na vrhu top lista. Uz to, otkrićete
zanimljive detalje iz privatnog života izvođača sa top liste.

"Generalka"
Koje javne ličnosti su radile intervencije na licu i telu? Kako su izgledale pre, a kako posle njih i da li one to kriju ili otvoreno o tome pričaju? Kroz ove zanimljive razgovore vode vas Milica Lešić i Ljubomir Dorontić.
LINK: https://bit.ly/K1Generalka

"Dnevna Doza Popa"
Glumačko-voditeljski par Nataša Aksentijević i Predrag Peđa Damnjanović vas uvode u svet pop kulture. Sa gostima pričaju o zabavnim sadržajima, umetnosti i aktuelnim dešavanjima u svetu i kod nas. Uz pomoć benda i kroz zabavne igre zajedno sa gostima se zabavljaju na dinamičan i upečatljiv način.
LINK: https://bit.ly/DnevnaDozaPopa

"Kec na Jedanaest"
Ponovo su tu! Omiljeni voditeljski par, Boško Jakovljević i Aleksandra Jeftanović, vode vas kroz kasni jutarnji šou, svakog radnog dana od 11 do 13.
LINK: https://bit.ly/KecNaJedanaest

Pratite nas na MTS-u, Supernovi i Orionu.

#K1

┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

snippet.title: Sta Bi Se Desilo Kad Bi Svi Prdnuli U isto Vreme ?
snippet.description:
Ko ne lajkuje video nije dobar covek 😁

Svi smo nekad u zivotu prdnuli, nekad pustimo one stidljive gasove koje niko ne primeti, nekad one sto smrde, nekad one glasne, a nekad uz neke od njih ide i iznenadjenje. Ali sta bi se desilo kad bi u isto vreme, svi ljudi na planeti, bez imalo stida, prdnuli. Da li bi to uticalo na kvalitet vazduha ? Koliko bi se osecalo ? I sta bi jedna sibica mogla da uradi, hajmo da saznamo.

Podrzite nas na Patreonu: https://bit.ly/2DY7fn3
Mail za Saradnju/Business email: BojanZlatarevic@gmail.com

Music, arrangement & mix: Joca Stefanović
Lyrics: Jovana Radosavljević


#FOBIJE

Ide priča da u oku mom đavo stanuje
Noć je gore
Jutra hladna k’o led

Da se svima
Pakao samo raduje
Jer tu ljubav ne stiže na red

A ti znaš, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
Loše skrojila

Nema sad šanse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije

Pored mene
Samo ranjene duše padaju
K’o da sada
Samo radim na zlo
Baš od one,
One što za ljubav bi dala sve
Jedan posto
Nije ostalo

A ti znaš, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
Loše skrojila

Nema sad šanse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije

Lome fobije

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency’s website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia​​

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-​​...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list​​...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram​​
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook​​
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial​​
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter​​
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube​​

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa​ #FutureNostalgia​ #Grammys

snippet.title: Lamborghini Urus v BMW X6M - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Head to http://bit.ly/-Spring-Event to check out a load of all-new carwow Spring Deals! Be quick though - they’re only there until March 31st! 
.............................................................

Check out Yiannimize - http://youtube.com/yiannimize

It’s Saturday morning, so you know what time it is… Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

We’ve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing who’s in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think it’ll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the Lambo’s bonnet, you’ll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But that’s not all… The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE!

.............................................................

snippet.title: Kardeşlerim 5. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Tek dertleri hayat mücadelesi olan dört kardeşin iç burkan, sevgi dolu hikâyesi… 

Başrollerini Celil Nalçakan, Halit Özgür Sarı, Cüneyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu Yağtu ve Simge Selçuk’un paylaştığı Kardeşlerim, herkese ve her şeye rağmen kopmayan, düştükçe birbirine tutunup yeniden ayağa kalkan gençlerin umut dolu öyküsünü ekrana getiriyor.

Kardeşlerim kanalına abone olmak için; https://bit.ly/3oKfCa7

snippet.title: POSLE RUCKA - Potresno - Pronasao rodjenog brata nakon 20 godina, a rekli su da je umro na rodjenju!
snippet.description:
#poslerucka #happytv
DANAS U EMISIJI "POSLE RUČKA" ISTRAŽUJEMO: Ako nema krađe beba, kako osobe proglašene mrtvima na rođenju roditelji ponekad pronađu tokom života pod drugim imenima na drugim lokacijama? Kako sprečiti krađe beba? Kakva kazna je najprikladnija za ljude koji se bave krađom dece?

Gosti: Jasmina Petrović - Žena koja sumnja da joj je ukradena beba
Ana Pejić - Sekretar "Udruženja roditelja nestalih beba Vojvodine" i žena kojoj je ukradena beba
Radmila Miljuš - Žena koja sumnja da joj je ukradena beba
Nikola Pajić - Momak koji je pronašao rođenog brata nakon 20 godina, a rekli su da je umro na rođenju
Nenad Petrović - Momak koji je kao beba usvojen i koji ne zna ko su mu biološki roditelji


Voditelj: Jovana Grgurević

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Vojislav Šešelj - Arkan i Giška su bili strah i trepet, ja sam bio opasniji! (14.3.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je prof. dr Vojislav Šešelj, predsednik Srpske radikalne stranke. Kao najmlađi doktor nauka u SFRJ skrenuo je pažnju na sebe nastupima u kojima je kritikovao komunistički režim zbog čega i osuđen na zatvorsku kaznu. Nakon izlaska iz zatvora nastavlja i pojačava disidentsku retoriku i poziva Srbe da se vrate sebi i odbace titoizam. Držao je predavanja u SAD, gde je govorio srpskoj emigraciji. Momčilo Đujić ga je proglasio četničkim vojvodom. Pozivao je izmeštanje Brozovog groba iz Beograda. Početkom raspada Jugoslavije pozivao je Srbe na borbu i stvaranje Velike Srbije. Slao je dobrovoljce na front i obilazio položaje srpskih snaga. U Srbiji je bio opozicija režimu Slobodana Miloševića, ali kako je sam govorio, uvek konstruktivna. U toku političkog delovanja upoznao je i dosta ljudi s one strane zakona, a s nekima poput Arkana i Giške ulazio je u otvoreni sukob, na ivici fizičkog. Komentarisao je kriminalne obračune devedesetih, često iznoseći u javnost ekskluzivne informacije o slučajevima, navodeći da ih dobija od "Laufera". Tokom agresije 1999. godine bio je potpredsednik Vlade, ali i veliki protivnik Kumanovskog sporazuma, apelujući da je trebalo istrajati duže u otporu agresoru. Nakon petoktobarskih promena o kojima govori da su bili istorijska greška srpskog naroda bio je opozicija režimu i veliki kritizer vlade Zorana Đinđića. Sam je priznao da je imao kontakt i sa vođama Zemunskog klana. Nakon objavljivanja optužnice Haškog tribunala protiv njega odlučio je da tamo i ode najavljujući krvavo proleće u Srbiji. Ubrzo nakon toga je likvidiran premijer Đinđić. U toku njegovog procesa u Hagu njegova stranka se podelila i deo članstva na čelu s Tomislavom Nikolićem i Aleksandrom Vučićem osnovao je Srpsku naprednu stranku. Iz Haškog tribunala je kako kaže izbačen, jer nisu znali šta više da rade sa njim. Napisao je veći broj knjiga, od "Ideologije srpskog nacionalizma" do mnogih knjiga beskompromisnih naslova kojima kritikuje konkretne ličnosti. Iz političke biografije izdvaja se i sledeće: četiri puta je bio kandidat za predsednika Republike Srbije. Obavljao je dužnost potpredsednika Vlade Republike Srbije, a u periodu od 1996. do 1998. bio je predsednik opštine Zemun. Preporučujemo da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate više o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 05.03.2021. godine u prostorijama Srpske radikalne stranke, u Zemunu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar Pavković.

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i žele da pomognu rad naše produkcije to mogu učiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudićemo se da ostanemo dosledni našoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i širenju istine bez cenzure.

snippet.title: Emanet 142. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 142 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Sefirin Kızı 45. Bölüm 2. Fragman
snippet.description:
Sefirin Kızı bütün bölümleri startv.com.tr'de → https://www.startv.com.tr/dizi/sefirin-kizi/bolumler

Sefirin Kızı'na Abone Olmak İçin → http://bit.ly/sfrn-kizi-dd-sub

Yaktığı kulübeyi Melek için yerine koymaya çalışan Sancar için hayatın bambaşka planları vardır. Hiç beklenmedik bir anda beklenmedik bir yerde karşısına çıkan gizemli bir kadın, Sancar’ın yaşamını sonsuza dek değiştirecektir.

Sancar, peşine takıldığı gizemi çözmeye çalışırken bir yandan da bilinmezliklerle dolu bu kadını kendisine rağmen korumaya uğraşır.

Yapım: NGM ve O3 Medya
Yönetmen: Emre Kabakuşak 
Senaryo: Eylem Canpolat - Ozan Aksungur - Defne Gürsoy - Oğuz Ayaz - Gamze Arslan Çelik - Ozanser Uğurlu

Oyuncu Kadrosu:
Sancar Efeoğlu: Engin Akyürek
Mavi: Tuba Büyüküstün
Bora: Ferit Aktuğ
Yahya: Doğukan Polat
Elvan: Hivda Zizan Alp
Refika: Özlem Çakar Yalçınkaya
Güven: Erdal Küçükkömürcü
Halise: Gonca Cilasun
Müge: Esra Kızıldoğan
Zehra: Cemre Öktem
Kavruk Ömer: Edip Tepeli
Melek: Beren Gençalp
Kahraman: Bülent Şakrak
Ceylan: Gözde Çığacı
Dudu: İlayda Ildır
Necdet: Sami Aksu
Gülsiye: Yağmur Başkurt

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
Music’s Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhené Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, säje, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); säje for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life

Look at me I’m never coming down

Everything I need is on the

On the ground

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground

snippet.title: EDITA - MELEK (OFFICIAL VIDEO)
snippet.description:
#Edita #Melek

Label and copyright: Edita & IDJTunes™, ℗ & © 2021. All rights reserved.
Listen on all platforms: https://idjtunes.fanlink.to/melek

Edita booking & info: +38163 262 500 (Saša Vasić)
Subscribe to Edita: https://bit.ly/3eD3Utc​

Follow me:
Facebook: https://bit.ly/3aYnD68
Instagram: https://bit.ly/34BncOa
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@editaaradinovic

Music: Bojan Vasić
Lyrics: Aleksandar Tomić-Tomica, Edita Aradinović
Arrangement: Bojan Vasić
Backing vocals: Edita Aradinović
Trumpet: Miloš Nikolić
Piano: Bojan Vasić
Violin: Ema Lukić
Guitar: Saša Sedlar
Bass: Miroslav Tovirac
Drums: Vladimir Ružičić
Mix: Jan Magdevski
Master: Jan Magdevski

🎵 Stream:
Deezer: http://bit.ly/2Zw8yUw
Spotify: http://spoti.fi/3pHmo0W
Apple: http://apple.co/2NqaWtp

Directed by: Nemanja Novaković
DoP: Lazar Bogdanović
Producer: Aleksandar Pejčić
Video Production: NN-media +38162357368

Editing: Nemanja Novaković/Aleksandar Kasalica
Color Correction: Nikola Marinković
Camera: Artcorestudio
Lighting: Sapa Light

Actor: Nikola 

Makeup: Ena Jović
Costume: Dijana Malnar
Hair: Jovana Jeremić



LYRICS:
Svaki sat, svaki sprat ja sam brojala,
Noćima ispred tvojih vrata plakala.
I kad ljubav u tebi ne osećam,
Ne dam ja na tebe - MOJE.

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Moj si lom, moj si slom, moj si brodolom,
Ja u tebi sve sam našla.

Moj si, moj savršen greh, neću, ne želim da stanem,
Ja bih da zagrlim te, a ti bi da odeš odavde.
Moj si, moj melek, moj bol!
Kako da pomerim s’ tobom kraj?
U oči dok gledam te sad, k’o dete u porušen grad...

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Boli kad zaplače u meni ta devojčica, što voli te, voli te, voli te...

Copying, re-uploading and illegally distributing this copyrighted work is strictly prohibited! ©

snippet.title: Kardeşlerim 6. Bölüm Fragmanı
snippet.description:
Tek dertleri hayat mücadelesi olan dört kardeşin iç burkan, sevgi dolu hikâyesi… 

Başrollerini Celil Nalçakan, Halit Özgür Sarı, Cüneyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu Yağtu ve Simge Selçuk’un paylaştığı Kardeşlerim, herkese ve her şeye rağmen kopmayan, düştükçe birbirine tutunup yeniden ayağa kalkan gençlerin umut dolu öyküsünü ekrana getiriyor.

Kardeşlerim kanalına abone olmak için; https://bit.ly/3oKfCa7

snippet.title: JOSTRA x ELDORADO - USPEH I MOC (OFFICIAL VIDEO)
snippet.description:
#Jostra #Eldorado #UspehiMoc

Label and Copyright: Režim & Južni Vetar, ℗ & © 2021. All rights reserved. 

Streaming link: coming soon... .

Follow Južni Vetar:
Instagram: https://bit.ly/2yULhS4
Facebook: https://bit.ly/2XGLpzb
YouTube: https://bit.ly/2XBW6TE
IMDB: https://imdb.to/3aaiF46

Follow JOSTRA:
https://bit.ly/3eG9NcJ

Follow ELDORADO:
https://bit.ly/3tgObYs

🎵 Muzika: Jostra, Eldorado
🎵 Tekst: Jostra, Eldorado
🎵 Aranžman: Damir Boz
🎵 Mix i Master: Muking

Montaža: Dragan Perić
Kolor korekcija: Dragan Perić
Kamera: Petar Stanković
Rasveta: Sound & Light Rental

Izvršni producent: Nemanja Petrović
Scenario i Režija: Strahinja Golubović

Hvala prijateljima : 
@dresovi_euro i @p2dsgn

Tekst :

Verse 1 (Jostra)

U gradu je kriminal, lova je u firmama
Bebe nose minival - braća nose kilogram
Kola ot Bulgaria - živim sa gorilama
Roba prva ruka, letim Kosovo-Bolivija

Dok pišamo uz vetar (uu uU)
Pijemo uz Južni vetar (uu uu)
Vodim igru kao Petar Maraš (uu uu)
Nisi brži nego metak, kalaš (uu uu) 

Ratata, 24 karata
Oko vrata i za brata oko ruke zlatan sat
Na ulici - ljubi brat, ovo ti je južni gas
Ovo nije Švajcarska, Balkan bure baruta

Hook:

Uspeh i moć
Nocas ne čekaj me ja ti neću doć
Uspeh i moć 
Sve što dođe mi za dan to ode mi za noć
Uspeh i moć
I samo pare leče ovu bol
južni vetar - alkohol, droga, suze krv i znoj

Verse 2 (Eldorado)

Jajare misle da menjaju svet
samo na rafalno hekler je 5
prenecu kofer i dobijaš ket
sad sam na granici zovem za pet
naša gerila je spremna do zuba
cistimo teren ko da smo UDBA
metkovi kamate kurve i gudra
brza frizura i devetka duga
nece ni Bog više da sudi
pravo kroz staklo metak u grudi
nocu se šibamo danju smo budni
sanduci borbene opreme puni
cetiri je strane sveta
veliki izbor nema šta
ja kod mene dva paketa
Nek mi sudi 92


Hook:

Uspeh i moc 
Nocas ne cekaj me ja ti necu doc
Uspeh i moc 
Sve što dodje mi za dan to ode mi za noc
Uspeh i moc 
I samo pare lece ovu bol
južni vetar - alkohol, droga, suze krv i znoj

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry’s Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project

12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions

snippet.title: Panathinaikos OPAP Athens - Crvena Zvezda mts Belgrade Highlights | EuroLeague, RS Round 30
snippet.description:
Crvena Zvezda MTS Belgrade took a hard-fought victory from OAKA after beating Panathinaikos OPAP Athens 82-86 on Friday night. 



ABOUT EUROLEAGUE BASKETBALL 
Euroleague Basketball (EB) is a global leader in the sports and entertainment business, devoted to running the top European competitions of professional basketball clubs under a unique and innovative organizational model. Owned and administered by some of the most successful and historic clubs in the world, EB manages and organizes the continent’s two premier men’s basketball competitions, the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague and the 7DAYS EuroCup, as well as the sport’s premier under-18 showcase, the EB Adidas Next Generation Tournament. 
The EB competitions bring the elite of European basketball to all five continents and to the entire sports community through the OTT platform EuroLeague TV. EB also organizes a series of community and educational programs. Its ground-breaking corporate social responsibility program One Team features all EB clubs that have already made a difference in the lives of over 22,000 participants. Its Sports Business MBA trains future professionals in sports management. 
About One Team 
One Team, Euroleague Basketball's corporate social responsibility (CSR) program, supported by Turkish Airlines as the One Team Founding Patron and with the collaboration of Special Olympics as Proud Partner, uses basketball to achieve real social impact in our communities. With an innovative model of interconnectedness across an entire continent, Euroleague Basketball and its clubs have developed a complete CSR program that brings together activities from each team in an integrated, impactful way, working under the theme of "community integration". Each participating club develops a specific One Team project tailored to its own community needs to benefit groups in danger of exclusion due to problems such as substance abuse and gender, physical or intellectual disability. Since its founding in 2012, the One Team program has reached already directly and indirectly more than 22,000 participants through its various team projects.

snippet.title: Emanet 141. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 141 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#shorts

snippet.title: Najlepši posni kolač koji ćete probati
snippet.description:
Najbolji posni kolač koji ste probali.
Pisani recept možete pronaći na https://domacirecepti.net/

Domaći recepti je kanal na kojem prikazujemo video recepte za torte, kolače, pogače, kifle. Možete naći predjela kao i glavna jela. Pravimo još i sitne kolače, kolače za slavu, lepinje, posna jela, slavske pogače.

▶ Možete nas podržati i na ovaj način: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCziASxiSNISFR_FxJ8vFjnA/join

𝐒𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐣𝐜𝐢:

400 ml tople vode
13 kašika šećera
3 kašike pekmeza
5 kašika mlevenih lešnika
100 g posnog mlevenog keksa
2 kašike kakaoa
4 kašike ulja
13 kašika mekog brašna
1 kašika sode bikarbone

Fil:

125 g omekšalog margarina
100 g šećera u prahu
200 g posnog keksa
100 g pečenog mlevenog lešnika
100 g crne posne čokolade
200 ml soka od pomorandže

2 kašike ulja

sr.title: Najlepši posni kolač koji ćete probati
sr.description:
Najbolji posni kolač koji ste probali.
Pisani recept možete pronaći na https://domacirecepti.net/

Domaći recepti je kanal na kojem prikazujemo video recepte za torte, kolače, pogače, kifle. Možete naći predjela kao i glavna jela. Pravimo još i sitne kolače, kolače za slavu, lepinje, posna jela, slavske pogače.

▶ Možete nas podržati i na ovaj način: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCziASxiSNISFR_FxJ8vFjnA/join

𝐒𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐣𝐜𝐢:

400 ml tople vode
13 kašika šećera
3 kašike pekmeza
5 kašika mlevenih lešnika
100 g posnog mlevenog keksa
2 kašike kakaoa
4 kašike ulja
13 kašika mekog brašna
1 kašika sode bikarbone

Fil:

125 g omekšalog margarina
100 g šećera u prahu
200 g posnog keksa
100 g pečenog mlevenog lešnika
100 g crne posne čokolade
200 ml soka od pomorandže

𝗚𝗹𝗮𝘇𝘂𝗿𝗮

100 g kakao table
2 kašike ulja

snippet.title: Emanet 140. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 140 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Sjećanje na Bricu legendu Vlašičkog ovčarstva
snippet.description:
Ramo Rubanović zvani Brico bio je živa legenda Vlašičkog ovčarstva. Volio  je ovčarstvo i uzgajao uvijek najbolje ovce. Bio je jako iskren i pošten čovjek. Imao je velikog smisla za humor pa je rado pričao svoje dogodovštine iz života. Poznavao sam ga petnaest godina. Bio je čovjek od riječi. Ako se nešto s Bricom dogovori to je za njega uvijek bio zakon. Otišao je iznenada u jedan bolji i ljepši svijet. Prijatelji će ga se uvijek rado sjećati i s poštovanjem govoriti o njemu. Ramo je danas sahranjen na mjesnom groblju u Dubu kod Travnika. Sa ovih nekoliko arhivskih inserata iz njegovog života sa ovcama željeli smo se oprostiti od ovoga dobroga čovjeka.
Pridružite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.title: Squishy Makeovers:  Easter Edition
snippet.description:
Welcome to another episode of squishy makeovers, where I transform ugly, used, old, dirty, cheap or unwanted squishies (donated by my subscribers) into my own creations. I repair, paint and cut away for hours on end to complete these. Hopefully you like them. Get used to lots of rainbow and sprinkles, because I am addicted to both!

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

_________FAQs__________

1. CAN I SEND YOU SQUISHIES?
So many generous people have sent me their unwanted squishies so I actually have a lot to work on already, BUT if you desperately want to, you can request my mailing address in the email ALLLL the way at down in the description (sorry for the traveling), make sure to read the disclaimer down there as well.

2. ARE SQUISHIES RETURNED TO THE SENDERS AFTER THE MAKEOVER?
No. These squishies  are sent as donations to the series because they were damaged, and no longer wanted. Everyone has been informed in advance that squishies would not be returned. It would be waaay too complicated/expensive and massively time consuming to keep track of everyone and return each squishy. I'm just one person! 

3. WHAT PAINT DO YOU USE?
I use fabric paint. Fabric paint is meant to stretch, so it is perfect for squishing! Any brand will work fine, but I mainly use Tulip. You can find it at Michaels, Hobby Lobby, A.C. Moore, Walmart, Joann Fabrics, and Online.

5. WILL FABRIC PAINT CRACK?
The matte fabric paint is more likely to crack after lots of squishing. Slick fabric paints never crack. But there are benefits to both. I usually mix the two paints together to get the best of both worlds.

6. CAN I USE ACRYLIC PAINT ON SQUISHIES?
I would not recommend that. Acrylic paint will either make the squishy hard, or it will crack and flake off very easily. 



___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers

localized.title: Squishy Makeovers:  Easter Edition
localized.description:
Welcome to another episode of squishy makeovers, where I transform ugly, used, old, dirty, cheap or unwanted squishies (donated by my subscribers) into my own creations. I repair, paint and cut away for hours on end to complete these. Hopefully you like them. Get used to lots of rainbow and sprinkles, because I am addicted to both!

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

_________FAQs__________

1. CAN I SEND YOU SQUISHIES?
So many generous people have sent me their unwanted squishies so I actually have a lot to work on already, BUT if you desperately want to, you can request my mailing address in the email ALLLL the way at down in the description (sorry for the traveling), make sure to read the disclaimer down there as well.

2. ARE SQUISHIES RETURNED TO THE SENDERS AFTER THE MAKEOVER?
No. These squishies  are sent as donations to the series because they were damaged, and no longer wanted. Everyone has been informed in advance that squishies would not be returned. It would be waaay too complicated/expensive and massively time consuming to keep track of everyone and return each squishy. I'm just one person! 

3. WHAT PAINT DO YOU USE?
I use fabric paint. Fabric paint is meant to stretch, so it is perfect for squishing! Any brand will work fine, but I mainly use Tulip. You can find it at Michaels, Hobby Lobby, A.C. Moore, Walmart, Joann Fabrics, and Online.

5. WILL FABRIC PAINT CRACK?
The matte fabric paint is more likely to crack after lots of squishing. Slick fabric paints never crack. But there are benefits to both. I usually mix the two paints together to get the best of both worlds.

6. CAN I USE ACRYLIC PAINT ON SQUISHIES?
I would not recommend that. Acrylic paint will either make the squishy hard, or it will crack and flake off very easily. 



___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

snippet.title: Doruk, Asiye'den hoşlanıyor mu? - Kardeşlerim 5. Bölüm
snippet.description:
5.Bölüm Özeti: 
“Kalp en çok tutunduğu dala kırılır”
Akif ve Suzan’ı öpüşürken yakalayan Harika’nın tepkisi Suzan’ı köşeye sıkıştırırken, Akif yine her şeyin üstünü örtme çabasındadır. Suzan yaşadığı açmazdan ve öğrendiği bir durumdan dolayı bunalır. Aldığı karar, Akif’le Nebahat’ı şok eder. Şengül’ün kurnazlıklarının hedefi ise bu sefer Nebahat’tır. Asiye ile Doruk okulda beraber şarkı söyleyince Harika iyice çileden çıkar ve Asiye’nin üzerine gider.  Ömer duruma tepkisiz kalamaz.  Aybike’nin eline Harika ile ilgili bir koz geçer ve bu koz Ömer ile Harika’yı karşı karşıya getirirken, Kadir’in Orhan’dan öğrendiği gerçek şok etkisi yaratır. 
Tek dertleri hayat mücadelesi olan dört kardeşin iç burkan, sevgi dolu hikâyesi… 

Başrollerini Celil Nalçakan, Halit Özgür Sarı, Cüneyt Mete, Fadik Sevin Atasoy, Ahu Yağtu ve Simge Selçuk’un paylaştığı Kardeşlerim, herkese ve her şeye rağmen kopmayan, düştükçe birbirine tutunup yeniden ayağa kalkan gençlerin umut dolu öyküsünü ekrana getiriyor.
